name: Sourdough Cornbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the sourdough starter and melted margarine until combined.
2. Add cornmeal, salt, sugar, sour cream or yogurt, eggs, flour, cream of tartar, and baking powder. Stir just enough to blend all ingredients together.
3. Pour batter into a buttered pan.
4. Bake in an oven set to 375 to 400 degrees for about 15 minutes.
